title: Advanced HTTP Status Codes & Error Handling
description: Implement advanced HTTP status code logic for various asynchronous and error conditions (e.g., 202, 207, 429). Standardize API error responses using RFC 7807 (Problem Details) for consistent client-side handling.
objectives: Implement advanced HTTP status code logic for various asynchronous and error conditions (e.g., 202, 207, 429).
Standardize API error responses using RFC 7807 (Problem Details) for consistent client-side handling.
